notes: Recommendations below are data-driven fallback from current GSC+GA4 dataset.

urgent.action: Rewrite zh/about-kona-coffee title/meta description to match this exact intent and add an FAQ block targeting flavor profile questions.
urgent.reasoning: 500 impressions at avg position 5.2 with 0 clicks indicates a CTR/intent mismatch on a query already ranking on page 1.

urgent.keyword: 夏威夷科纳适合冲美式吗
urgent.action: Add a dedicated Chinese subsection answering whether Kona coffee suits Americano brewing, with concise answer + internal links to menu and about pages.
urgent.reasoning: 378 impressions at position 6.1 with 0 clicks is an immediate conversion opportunity from informational search demand.

quickWins.keyword: 夏威夷科纳咖啡 介绍
quickWins.action: Add stronger first-paragraph summary and localized meta description in Simplified Chinese to improve SERP snippet relevance.
quickWins.reasoning: 314 impressions at position 8.1 can gain clicks quickly with snippet and intent alignment improvements.

quickWins.action: Tune EN homepage metadata and H1/H2 copy to include Waikiki + donut context to disambiguate from generic coffee queries.
quickWins.reasoning: 31 impressions at position 5.6 with 0 clicks suggests SERP messaging is too generic and not compelling for local intent.

opportunities.action: Expand Chinese and Korean long-tail coffee education pages and cross-link to product/menu pages with language-specific CTAs.
opportunities.reasoning: Most impressions are concentrated in zh/ko informational intents, but clicks are near zero; stronger journey design can convert this demand.

opportunities.action: Ensure all public copy states grand opening as early March 2026 and avoid Feb 25 references in any SEO-visible content.
opportunities.reasoning: Date mismatch can reduce trust, create stale snippets, and hurt engagement from users checking opening status.

insights.suggestion: Prioritize this page as the primary CTR recovery target before broad site-wide changes.

insights.observation: Branded query 'kona coffee donut' shows strong performance (5 clicks, avg position 1.1).
insights.suggestion: Protect branded SERP assets and replicate the same clear value proposition on non-branded pages.
